acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Evidence records the full workspace mutation baseline from main, including 105 missed mutants and 4 timeouts.
Focused tests cover the Hyprland parser missed and timeout mutant cluster in `crates/hyprland/src/model/parser.rs`.
A targeted mutation check for the Hyprland parser cluster is run, or any residual surviving parser mutants are explicitly documented with rationale.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-hyprland-parser-mutation-hardening/commands.log records orchestrator rerun: 78 mutants tested in 26s, 35 caught, 43 unviable, no missed mutants and no timeouts.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: `qd gate m4-hyprland-parser-mutation-hardening --phase ci` passes before PR promotion.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: orchestrator will run qd gate before PR promotion

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No Hyprland runtime, product QUIC, capture, encode, render, presentation, or Mac validation claim is changed.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: git diff is limited to parser tests/parser grammar plus node evidence and reports

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node is parser unit and mutation hardening only; no runtime platform behavior is claimed.
